name: claude-vault-capture
description: Automatically turns Claude Code sessions into curated Obsidian notes. On SessionEnd a backgrounded worker scrubs secrets, summarizes the session, and writes a decision/runbook/gotcha to your vault's Inbox/auto/. Includes the /vault-save skill for on-demand exports.

vault_dir.title: Obsidian vault path
vault_dir.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault. Captures are written to <vault>/Inbox/auto/ and /vault-save exports to <vault>/claude-docs/.

use_subscription.title: Bill to Claude subscription
use_subscription.description: Set to 1 to route model calls through the Claude Agent SDK and bill them to your Claude Pro/Max subscription instead of a metered API key. Requires the `claude` CLI and an OAuth token below. Leave blank to use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.description: API key for metered (default) mode. Leave blank if you set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in your environment or are using subscription mode.

oauth_token.title: Claude OAuth token (subscription mode)
oauth_token.description: Long-lived token from `claude setup-token` (starts with sk-ant-oat01-…). Only needed when 'Bill to Claude subscription' is 1. Stored in your OS keychain.
